name: Gemini 3 Deep Think
tagline: Current Deep Think; advanced reasoning mode, rolled out to AI Ultra subscribers.
seoTitle: Gemini 3 Deep Think — Google LLM specs
metaDescription: Gemini 3 Deep Think (Google), released 2025-12-03 — part of the Gemini Deep Think line. Current Deep Think; advanced reasoning mode, rolled out to AI Ultra sub…
overview: Gemini 3 Deep Think is a large language model from Google, part of the Gemini Deep Think line. Released 2025-12-03. Extended parallel-reasoning mode that explores multiple ideas before answering, offered to top-tier (Ultra) subscribers.
What's notable in this version: Current Deep Think; advanced reasoning mode, rolled out to AI Ultra subscribers.
